title: Munir left Tehran after meeting Pezeshkian and Ghalibaf — 'encouraging progress'
snippet: Pakistan Army chief Field Marshal Asim Munir left Tehran Saturday after separate meetings with President Pezeshkian and Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf. Pakistan said there was 'encouraging progress toward a final understanding.' Iran warns US against renewed attacks.
tag_reason: Update: reverses initial cancellation report — Munir flew to Tehran Friday, met leaders, departed Saturday with 'encouraging progress.'
